name: sdd-domain
description: Domain-Driven Design upstream lane producing a human-approved domain model (domain story, event storming, ubiquitous language, context map, aggregates, message flow, C4 container) ahead of sdd-forge Phase 1.

interface.shortDescription: DDD upstream lane for domain modeling
interface.longDescription: Interview-driven, seven-stage Domain-Driven Design pipeline that produces a reviewed and human-approved domain model consumed by downstream sdd-forge specifications.
capabilities: Independent domain review and cross-model verification
Downstream conformance sync for bootstrap specs
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the domain-model skill to build or update the approved domain model.
